Mamata in lawyer’s robes at HC: Bar Council seeks verification of ex-CM’s practice status
description: The Bar Council of India has requested detailed information from the West Bengal Bar Council regarding Mamata Banerjee's legal enrollment and practice status. This follows her appearance in lawyer's robes at the Calcutta High Court to argue a public interest litigation. The BCI seeks to verify her active status as an advocate, given her previous tenure as Chief Minister.

Precision, production & power: How long can US last in a war with China?
description: During a Beijing visit, President Trump observed China's military might, signaling a shift in global power. While the US faces munitions shortages and slow production, China's defense industry operates at wartime pace, excelling in drones, AI, and satellite tech. This evolving warfare, particularly concerning Taiwan, highlights a contest for future global dominance.

Meta's highest-paid employee is not happy with 'just money motivated' tag for his team
description: Meta SuperIntelligence Lab chief Alexandr Wang is pushing back on the idea that his team joined for the money. On the Core Memory podcast, Wang said the real draw was compute access, talent density, and research freedom—not the $100 million packages Meta reportedly offered. He also addressed the viral soup story involving Mark Zuckerberg and an OpenAI recruit.

title: Jannik Sinner and Laila Hasanovic’s combined net worth in 2026
description: Jannik Sinner and Laila Hasanovic’s combined net worth in 2026 is estimated at around $35 million to $40 million. Most of that wealth comes from Sinner’s tennis prize money, ATP success, and endorsement deals with global brands. Hasanovic contributes through modeling, fashion partnerships, and social media promotions. Sinner’s growing success in international tennis continues driving the couple’s financial growth.

title: Ben Shelton and Trinity Rodman’s combined net worth and earnings
description: American tennis star Ben Shelton and U.S. soccer forward Trinity Rodman have become one of the most talked-about young sports couples in recent years. Both athletes are enjoying rapid success in their respective sports while building impressive fortunes at a young age. Shelton has become one of the rising faces of men’s tennis, while Rodman continues to shine for the Washington Spirit and the United States women’s national soccer team.
